statics.name: copyFrom
statics.description: Copies graphics and properties from another FlxSprite or FunkinSprite.

members.name: extra
members.description: Extra dynamic data attached to this sprite.

members.name: spriteAnimType
members.description: The animation type for this sprite (NONE, BEAT, LOOP).

members.name: beatAnims
members.description: List of animations to play on beat.

members.name: zoomFactor
members.description: Zoom factor applied during draw relative to the camera center.

members.name: debugMode
members.description: If true, disables auto loop anim behavior.

members.name: animEnabled
members.description: If false, disables animation updates and beat anims.

members.name: zoomFactorEnabled
members.description: If false, disables zoom factor during draw.

members.name: beatInterval
members.description: How many beats between each beat anim. Minimum 1.

members.name: beatOffset
members.description: Beat offset for beat anim alignment.

members.name: skipNegativeBeats
members.description: If true, skips beat anims on negative beats.

members.name: lastAnimContext
members.description: The context of the last played animation.

members.name: animateSettings
members.description: Settings passed to FlxAnimate on loadSprite.

members.name: globalCurFrame
members.description: Gets or sets the current frame of the active animation.

functions.name: new
functions.description: Creates a new FunkinSprite.

functions.name: loadSprite
functions.description: Loads a sprite from a path using Paths.getFrames.

functions.name: playAnim
functions.description: Plays an animation by name. Applies the corresponding animOffset automatically.

functions.name: addAnim
functions.description: Adds an animation to the sprite.

functions.name: removeAnim
functions.description: Removes an animation by name.

functions.name: getAnim
functions.description: Returns the animation object by name.

functions.name: addOffset
functions.description: Adds an animation offset by name.

functions.name: switchOffset
functions.description: Swaps the offsets of two animations.

functions.name: getAnimOffset
functions.description: Returns the offset FlxPoint for the given animation name.

functions.name: hasAnim
functions.description: Returns true if the animation exists.

functions.name: getAnimName
functions.description: Returns the name of the currently playing animation.

functions.name: isAnimReversed
functions.description: Returns true if the current animation is reversed.

functions.name: getNameList
functions.description: Returns a list of all animation names on this sprite.

functions.name: stopAnim
functions.description: Stops the current animation.

functions.name: isAnimFinished
functions.description: Returns true if the current animation has finished playing.

functions.name: isAnimAtEnd
functions.description: Returns true if the current animation is on its last frame.

functions.name: isOnScreen
functions.description: Returns true if the sprite is visible within the given camera bounds.

functions.name: beatHit
functions.description: Called every beat. Triggers beat animations if animEnabled is true.

functions.name: stepHit
functions.description: Called every step.

functions.name: measureHit
functions.description: Called every measure.

functions.name: destroy
functions.description: Destroys the sprite and cleans up animation offsets.
